customizations.message: <AFFECTED_ROWS> rows will be affected, which is more than the allowed '<THRESHOLD>' rows. The SQL statement is '<STATEMENT>'.

executedChecks.description: This checks triggers when the Max Affected Rows Allowed value is exceeded by the number of rows DELETED by a SQL statement.  The SQL statement is executed against the database, and then rolled back.

executedChecks.checkName: Check Affected Rows Count on Insert

customizations.message: <AFFECTED_ROWS> rows will be affected, which is more than the allowed '<THRESHOLD>' rows. The SQL statement is '<STATEMENT>'.

executedChecks.description: This checks triggers when the Max Affected Rows Allowed value is exceeded by the number of rows INSERTED by a SQL statement.  The SQL statement is executed against the database, and then rolled back.

executedChecks.checkName: Check Affected Rows Count on Update

customizations.message: <AFFECTED_ROWS> rows will be affected, which is more than the allowed '<THRESHOLD>' rows. The SQL statement is '<STATEMENT>'.

executedChecks.description: This checks triggers when the Max Affected Rows Allowed value is exceeded by the number of rows UPDATED by a SQL statement.  The SQL statement is executed against the database, and then rolled back.

executedChecks.description: This check triggers when a changeset contains the user-specified runInTransactions value of 'true' or 'false'. Note: Changesets without a runInTransactions value are not checked.

customizations.message: null

executedChecks.description: This check triggers when a changelog does not start with the required '--liquibase formatted sql' header.
This check warns a user when a table is being truncated so that they can ensure that truncating the table won't lead to unintentional loss of data.

executedChecks.checkName: Warn on Detection of grant that contains 'WITH GRANT OPTION'
executedChecks.description: This check warns a user when SQL contains 'GRANT' statements that include the 'WITH GRANT OPTION' clause so that they can ensure that the privilege being granted won't lead to security issues

executedChecks.checkName: Warn on Detection of grant that contains 'WITH ADMIN OPTION'
executedChecks.description: This check warns a user when SQL contains 'GRANT' statements that include the 'WITH ADMIN OPTION' clause so that they can ensure that the privilege being granted won't lead to security issues
This check triggers when a changeset does not have a rollback defined.

executedChecks.checkName: Changesets Must Have a Label Assigned
executedChecks.description: This check enforces the Liquibase recommendation that labels be assigned to each changeset to provide better deployment control and to enhance traceability of efforts across changesets.

executedChecks.checkName: Changesets Must Have a Context Assigned
executedChecks.description: This check enforces the Liquibase recommendation that contexts be assigned to each changeset to provide better deployment control and to enhance traceability of efforts across changesets.

executedChecks.checkName: Changesets Must Have a Comment Assigned
executedChecks.description: This check enforces the Liquibase recommendation that comments be added to each changeset to document the purpose of a changeset for other/future consumers of this changelog
This check enforces the Liquibase Best Practice of keeping individual changesets small by limiting them to one statement or change.
